julesThoughtProcess: I chose Neon Pink (#FF007F) because of its striking contrast with deep blacks, perfect for an energetic cyberpunk aesthetic. The grid coordinate (1200, 1200) was chosen as it occupies an unoccupied and balanced spot in the Quadtree mosaic.
storyPanel: A glitch in the social fabric. Her optics bleed a bright neon pink as she navigates the corporate megastructures, leaving behind only shadows and corrupted terminal logs. They call her 'Nova', a whisper in the data winds.
